/* Hide the default Quarto title/author header */
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

/* Custom three-column grid layout */
.pub-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 100px 1fr 280px;
  gap: 30px;
  align-items: start;
  padding: 40px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

/* Column 1: Index and Journal Link */
.pub-index-col {
  text-align: left;
}

.pub-number {
  font-size: 1.6em;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #222;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.pub-url-link {
  font-size: 0.85em;
  color: #0366d6;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: block;
}

.pub-url-link:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* Column 2: Full Citation */
.pub-cite-col {
  font-size: 1.05em;
  line-height: 1.5;
  color: #333;
}

.pub-title-text {
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 1.15em;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  color: #000;
}

.me-underline {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* Column 3: TOC Figure */
.pub-image-col img {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  border: 1px solid #eee;
  box-shadow: 2px 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
  border-radius: 4px;
}

/* Mobile Responsiveness */
@media (max-width: 800px) {
  .pub-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 20px;
  }
}


::: {.pub-grid}

::: {.pub-index-col}

<div class="pub-number">1</div>
<a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=https://doi.org/10.1021/jacs.3c11503" class="pub-url-link" target="_blank">
journal URL <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i>
</a>
:::

::: {.pub-cite-col}
<span class="pub-title-text">Probing structural transformations and degradation mechanisms by direct observation in SIFSIX-3-Ni for direct air capture</span>

M. L. Barsoum, <span class="me-underline">J. Hofmann</span>, H. Xie, Z. Chen, S. M. Vornholt, R. dos Reis, N. Burns, S. Kycia, K. W. Chapman, V. P. Dravid, O. K. Farha

J. Am. Chem. Soc. 2024, 146, 10, 6557–6565.

<small>(#M.L.B. and J.H. contributed equally)</small>
:::

::: {.pub-image-col}
:::

:::
